channel.title: Home on 11-55: Trans-Neural Network
channel.description: Recent content in Home on 11-55: Trans-Neural Network

item.title: THE PFHOR ENCOUNTER: SECTOR 7
item.description:
[ MISSION_REPORT_772 ]

The Pfhor forces have breached the outer hull. Security teams are currently engaged in Sector 7.

TACTICAL UPDATE:

  1. Maintain high-ground advantage.
  2. Watch for cloaked units.
  3. Ensure all bio-scans are functional.

“They are not like us. They do not think like us. They only consume.” — Commander Leela

End of transmission.

item.title: PROTOCOL 11-55: MISSION_PARAMETERS
item.description:
[ ARCHIVE_ENTRY_001 ]

11-55 is a high-security communications array operating in the Tau Ceti system. This platform is dedicated to the dissemination of tactical intelligence and the preservation of UESC heritage.

ORIGINS: Constructed on the Marathon (UESC-942-A) in the late 24th century.

CURRENT_STATUS:

  • Primary Core: ACTIVE
  • Encryption: LVL_9
  • Uplink: STABLE

We are here to ensure that the story of the Marathon and its AI guardians is never forgotten.

TRANSMISSION_COMPLETE.

item.title: SIGNAL UPLINK PROTOCOL
item.description:
[ ESTABLISHING_COMM_LINK ]

If you have tactical data to share or require further intel, use the following uplink protocols.

TERMINAL_ACCESS:

  • Terminal: Tau Ceti Node B
  • Encryption: AS_256
  • Protocol: 11-55-BETA

NEURAL_LINK: Direct your thoughts towards the AI core. We will find you.

ATTENTION: ALL SIGNALS ARE MONITORED BY UESC SECURITY.

item.title: TERMINAL ACCESS: PROTOCOL 11-55
item.description:
[ ACCESSING_TERMINAL_B7_42 ]

System integrity compromised. Encryption keys are cycling every 55 seconds. We need a direct uplink to the AI core to stabilize the situation.

SYSTEM_LOG:

  • Core Temperature: 104°C (WARNING)
  • Neural Buffers: 88% Capacity
  • AI Presence: Durandal (Divergent)

Be careful. The terminal is watching you as much as you are watching it.

DECRYPTION_FAILED: RE-ATTEMPTING…

item.title: Post 1
item.description:
